ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Christopher Nolan'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(b:Movie {title: 'The Dark Knight'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(c:Movie {title: 'The Dark Knight'}),
    p3 = (b)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'The Dark Knight', tagline: 'A bird does not sing because it has an answer, it sings because it has a song'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How has Christopher Nolan’s directorial influence on *The Dark Knight* shaped its critical reception compared to his role as an actor in the same film?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Christopher Nolan'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: 'The Dark Knight'})
WITH m
MATCH (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m)<-[:REVIEWED]-(r:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)
RETURN m.title AS movie, r.name AS reviewer, r.rating AS rating
